json-formatter.instructions: Paste your JSON text in the input area and click Format to beautify it.

base64.input_placeholder: Enter text to encode or Base64 string to decode...
base64.instructions: Enter text and click Encode to convert to Base64, or paste a Base64 string and click Decode to convert back. Toggle URL-safe mode for URL-compatible encoding.

word-counter.input_placeholder: Type or paste your text here...
word-counter.instructions: Type or paste your text to see real-time statistics.

url-encoder.input_placeholder: Enter text to encode or encoded string to decode...
url-encoder.instructions: Enter text and click Encode to URL-encode it, or paste an encoded string and click Decode. Choose between encodeURIComponent and encodeURI modes.

timestamp.instructions: Convert between Unix timestamps and human-readable dates. The current timestamp updates in real-time.

json-minify.instructions: Paste JSON and click Minify to compress, Escape to escape special characters, or Unescape to reverse escaping.

uuid-generator.instructions: Generate UUID v4 identifiers. Choose quantity and format, then click Generate.

hash-calculator.instructions: Enter text and select hash algorithms. Results update in real-time.

color-converter.instructions: Pick a color or enter a HEX value to see all format conversions.

radix-converter.error_invalid: Invalid input for the selected base
radix-converter.instructions: Enter a number and select its base. All four base conversions are shown simultaneously.

case-converter.instructions: Enter text and select a conversion mode. The result updates in real-time.

password-generator.instructions: Configure password options and click Generate. Use the strength indicator to evaluate security.

json-sort.instructions: Paste a JSON object and click Sort to order keys alphabetically. Array order is preserved.

regex-tester.instructions: Enter a regex pattern and test text. Matches are highlighted in real-time. Toggle flags as needed.

json-converter.instructions: Select source and target formats, paste your data, and click Convert.

json-to-class.instructions: Paste JSON data, select a target language and root class name, then click Generate.

jwt-decoder.instructions: Paste a JWT token and click Decode to view its header, payload, and signature. Timestamps are shown as readable dates.

json-schema.instructions: Paste JSON data and click Generate Schema to create a JSON Schema (Draft-07).

qrcode.text_placeholder: Enter text or URL to encode...
qrcode.coming_soon: QR code generation requires a library. Coming soon!
qrcode.instructions: Enter text or a URL to generate a QR code. Customize size and colors.

unicode-converter.input_placeholder: Enter text or Unicode escape sequences...
unicode-converter.instructions: Convert text to Unicode escape sequences (\uXXXX) or decode Unicode back to text.

symmetric-cipher.input_placeholder: Enter text to encrypt or ciphertext to decrypt...
symmetric-cipher.instructions: Encrypt text using AES-CBC or decrypt ciphertext with the same password.

html-escape.input_placeholder: Enter HTML to escape or escaped text to unescape...
html-escape.instructions: Escape HTML special characters (&, <, >, ", ') to entities or unescape them back.

file-base64.drop_label: Drop a file here or click to browse
file-base64.instructions: Upload a file to get its Base64 and Data URI, or paste Base64 to download as a file.

text-dedup.instructions: Paste text and remove duplicate lines. Toggle case sensitivity as needed.

text-sort.instructions: Paste text and sort lines by different criteria.

text-trim.instructions: Clean up text by removing empty lines, trimming whitespace, or joining lines.

naming-converter.instructions: Enter a variable name to see all naming convention conversions in real-time.

js-formatter.instructions: Paste JS/HTML code and click Beautify to format or Minify to compress.

css-formatter.instructions: Paste CSS code and click Beautify to format or Minify to compress.

sql-formatter.instructions: Paste SQL and click Format to uppercase keywords and indent, or Minify to compress.

xml-formatter.instructions: Paste XML and click Format to indent or Minify to compress.

properties-yaml.instructions: Convert between .properties and YAML formats. Nested keys are supported.

json-to-sql.input_placeholder: Paste a JSON array of objects...
json-to-sql.instructions: Paste a JSON array and specify a table name to generate SQL INSERT statements.

diff-viewer.instructions: Paste two texts to compare them side by side with color-coded differences.

markdown-editor.instructions: Write Markdown on the left and see the rendered preview on the right.

cron-generator.instructions: Build a cron expression by editing fields or typing directly. See human-readable description and next run times.

unit-converter.instructions: Select a category, enter a value, and choose units to convert between.

filesize-converter.instructions: Enter a file size value and unit to see conversions in both decimal and binary systems.

random-number.instructions: Set range and count, then generate random integers or floating-point numbers.

php-serialize.input_placeholder: Paste JSON or PHP serialized data...
php-serialize.instructions: Convert JSON to PHP serialized format or unserialize PHP data back to JSON.

errors.not_found_description: The page you are looking for does not exist.
errors.tool_error: An error occurred in this tool.
